description: 目標語系個人化層任務包：錯誤型態驅動的動態派題與補救

tasks.desc: Define personalization contract (signals, learner state, decision outputs).
Define learner-state schema (error profile, hint dependency, response latency).
Integrate personalization decision hook into TLG-005 generation pipeline.
Implement TLG-006 gate checks for unsafe or unstable policy outputs.
Pilot adaptive flow on KO A1/A2 and compare completion/retention metrics.
